key_insights: Pure frontend implementation with React + Tailwind CSS, no backend needed
Avoid eval() for expression parsing — use safe parser (reverse Polish notation or recursive descent)
MVP scope: basic arithmetic, clear/backspace, responsive layout
Differentiation through clean UI design and calculation history
Extension path: scientific mode, theme switching, history
risks: Market saturation — hard to differentiate as standalone product
Expression parsing edge cases (division by zero, overflow, floating point precision)
Scope creep if scientific/advanced features added without planning
